name: Shared onboarded company for all non-fresh-wizard tests
description:
Single onboarded react_sdk_demo_company_onboarded company shared across every spec in every domain except company-onboarding wizard tests (which need a fresh react_sdk_demo via shared/fresh-wizard). Replaces the previous onboarded-ro + onboarded-canary split — those existed to separate read-only specs from mutating canaries when they lived in different shards. Now that canary specs live in their domain folders alongside lifecycle specs, ordering is handled by numeric filename prefix:

- 01-89: read-only or create-isolated-entity specs (timestamped names, no shared mutations)
- 90-99: mutating specs (consume pay periods, terminate employees, submit policies). Within 90-99, lower numbers run first; ordering matters when one mutation depends on another's preconditions (e.g. payroll dismissal must run before regular payroll consumes the open period).

Decorations cover every entity contract any consuming spec needs:

- HQ location for employee work-address picker and time-off employee enrollment
- Biweekly pay schedule for payroll landing + transition + canary 04 (which mutates it to weekly mid-suite)
- alice (full salaried, w2-salaried-employee fragment) for employee-list and time-off enrollment specs
- selfee (work_address only) for the employee self-onboarding submit spec — scenario.employeeIds.selfee is a contract
- charlie (individual, contractor-1099 fragment) for contractor-mixed-roster
- acme (business, 'Acme Consulting LLC') for contractor-business and contractor-onboarding-edit specs — the business name is a fixture key
- payable (Pat Payable, Hourly $75, onboarding_completed) for contractor payment submit specs — scenario.contractorIds.payable is a contract

Full health gate runs at e2e-setup time: onboarding_completed, signatory with passed identity verification, zero payroll blockers, at least one onboarded employee. Refusing to write the artifact if any check fails.
